message:
docs(README): add Round 1 to performance optimization table (br-zxh3 / fd90.87)

Continuation of fd90.74-86 README audit. The "Performance"
section's lead claimed "Five optimization rounds with formal
evidence" but the table beneath listed only 4 (Rounds 2-5). The
artifacts/perf/ROUND1_*.md files document a real Round 1
optimization that the table missed: removed duplicate
run_fixture_operation invocation inside run_fixture
(per ROUND1_OPPORTUNITY_MATRIX.md, score 15.0, decision: implement).

Add the Round 1 row to the table so the count matches the
five-rounds lead claim and so users browsing the README see the
full optimization history without having to dig into the
artifacts/perf/ directory.

Pure README change, no code impact. Build passes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -668,6 +668,7 @@ Five optimization rounds with formal evidence:
 
 | Round | Optimization | Speedup |
 |-------|-------------|---------|
+| Round 1 | Remove duplicate `run_fixture_operation` invocation inside `run_fixture` | Eliminates redundant per-fixture work |
 | Round 2 | `align_union` borrowed-key HashMap | Eliminates index clones |
 | Round 3 | GroupBy identity-alignment fast path | Skips reindex when indexes match |
 | Round 4 | Dense Int64 aggregation path | O(1) array access, no HashMap |
